description_long: This object is a ground-mounted solar panel installation, consisting of a rectangular array of photovoltaic modules supported by a single vertical metal pole anchored in a concrete base. The solar panel array is composed of multiple blue-tinted photovoltaic cells arranged in a grid, framed by a metallic structure. The pole is centrally positioned and appears to be made of galvanized steel, providing sturdy support for the elevated panel. The base is a solid concrete block, ensuring stability and resistance to wind or tampering. The panel is tilted at an angle to optimize sunlight capture, and the entire structure is situated on a patch of grass, suggesting outdoor installation. No visible electrical cabling or inverter components are present on the exterior.
description: A ground-mounted, pole-supported solar panel array with a concrete base and blue photovoltaic cells, tilted for optimal sunlight capture.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the metallic frame and support pole, with the back of the solar panel visible above the concrete base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tilt angle of the solar panel and the vertical support pole anchored in the concrete base.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full array of blue photovoltaic cells in a rectangular grid, supported by the central pole and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the panel's tilt and the shadow cast by the structure, with the support pole and base visible.
attribute_panel_orientation: tilted at approximately 30 degrees, facing away from the support pole, orientation appears fixed
attribute_mounting_structure_type: pole-mounted, ground installation with a steel pole and concrete base
attribute_array_configuration: 2x3 grid of solar panels in a single rectangular array
